and you go up a little bit the value goes up a little bit and you see they get the price goes up and it goes up a little more and there's this this value ladder you take someone along okay now what you have to understand in this in business at all it's all about value how much value do you give your customers and they receive value at one level they're naturally going to want to send up and get more value from you okay think about any business that you've had any interactions with where if you do something with them and you receive value you're like man this was awesome I want more of that I want to go to another movie I want to go back to that masseuse I want to whatever it is if you receive value one level you all you you automatically want it to to ascend up and receive more value okay so this is a this is a value ladder now I'm gonna show you kind of like what a value ladder looks in my business or a business of an author or a speaker or a consultant okay this is kind of what a dot-com secrets value ladder looks like okay at the bottom of the value ladder we give away something for free right a free newsletter or free ebook or free CD or something okay and notice that the the value isn't that high the price is low so someone comes in there and they get that thing now if they receive value from that thing they're naturally gonna want more right they say man that was never read it every time I go to a seminar people are like man you got to read Think and Grow Rich who here do I think and grow rich everyone raises their hand except for me I'm like man I'm like that dude who hasn't read it yet and but it was hard because I didn't have time to sit down and actually read a book and so I was kind of frustrated and then I remember one day I was on eBay goofing around looking for something cool to buy as I do often and then all of a sudden I saw I saw someone was selling the audio version of Think and Grow Rich and it was 97 bucks and I was like you know what that is awesome so I spent $97 they shipped me the CDs when I was driving around the you know around town all they listen to CDs and within about two weeks I had read I say that in parentheses in quotations I read the book Think and Grow Rich because I listened to it right now let me ask you is there any difference between the text version of Think and Grow Rich down here at the bottom of the value ladder or the audio version of Think and Grow Rich up at the top no it's it's the exact same words it's just a dude reading the words but down here for $10 I got the book but they packaged it differently so I was willing to spend 10 times as much money $100 I spent for the CDs because it was packaged differently in a way that was more convenient for me to consume it okay that makes sense you guys so this is a quote you need to understand is people will spend more money for the exact same content packaged in a different way and say again people will spend more money for the exact same content packaged in a different way think about some of the chiropractic standpoint right you can go give someone a your e-book on how to increase your health and they can go and follow those things or you can have a health regimen they come once a week you weigh them you give them the next piece of it and the book you can sell for 10 bucks the the regimen you can sell for $3,500 same information packaged in a different way makes you use to consume more accountability whatever it is but that's that's what's happening in business you guys happens all day long and not just information businesses okay again this is like the information business like I kind of showed you how how how typical info product business works but works in the real world as well okay here's the value ladder for a dentist now I want to explain how a story about how I had the the joy to go through a dentist value ladder about and probably six or seven years ago so I had started my internet business and like most entrepreneurs I didn't know anything about starting a business I just wanted to sell stuff and so I'm selling stuff and I'm making money and and my wife and I just got married and so we didn't have insurance I'm like oh I didn't think about that so we ended up about four years in my business getting health and dental insurance right and so and so we got insurance and I had been a dentist for probably five or six years because I didn't have dental insurance and so we now had the ability to go to the dentist and all of a sudden this post card showed up in the mail from from willow tree dental and said I basically just said hey there's a coming for a free teeth cleaning and I was like sweet free teeth cleaning I got dental insurance now I'm in so we show up the dentist for the teeth cleaning he's going through his cleaning my teeth and after a few minutes he looks at me says hey Russell has had a question like yeah he's like do you drink coffee or do you smoke or something like what what do you mean he said well your teeth are kind of yellow so I'm curious like do you either drink coffee or smoke or just curious why your teeth are so yellow I was like no I don't drink coffee will be white very quickly if you're interested I was like yes please yes why my teeth I don't want it so he went he made me a teeth whitening kit really quick thing goes back he's working my teeth shifting again and that usually happens people had braces and they don't have them now I was like my my teeth are shifting are you serious he said yeah they're they're definitely shifting I was like what can you do about that it's like well if you want I can build a retainer for you and the retainer will help keep all your teeth in place and and they won't get they won't shift anymore Mike yes you guys through this process because I think it's I think it's kind of kind of powerful okay all right let me jump in here so the first thing I'll talk about is the power of free excuse me so if any of you guys have had a chance to read the book predictably irrational by Dan uh Arlie I'm not sure the pronounce his last name um it's a really cool book you should read it just because it's awesome um and because I said so but it's it's worth reading definitely for sure um but in the book they talk about um a bunch of different different uh case studies and things that happen and this is one that just when I read this the first time it just had a huge impact on me and um we shifted a ton of our business because of it so they said they did this test and they tested it first like with college kids and they did with older people younger people and it doesn't test like a thousand times and every time it comes out consistent so they took a Hershey kiss right which Hershey kiss is worth what like you know a tenth of a penny and took a nice lint chocolate like the really nice expensive chocolates right and they put two plates out there one with a with a stack of Hershey kisses and one with a stack of lint mints and they said uh basically it's one cent to buy a Hershey kiss or 26 cents to buy a lint chocolate and they put all these people through this line right and they they let them do it and they found it was like 40 uh it was like 50 50 like 40 percent or 40 uh 40 people would buy Hershey kiss 40 people buy lints like almost 50 50 um and first they thought well it's because that's like pulled money out of their wallet and it's a quarter versus a penny so instead let's put like in a cafeteria line we're already buying food they just like add it to their to their bill that way there's no extra effort it's just you picked you want the one cent chocolate or the 26 cent chocolate right and it was just split 50 50 and they're like hey that's that's kind of cool to know they said okay let's do a test let's drop the price of each of these by one penny so let's drop the Hershey kiss from one cent down to free and the lint from 26 cents down to 25 cents okay so they just dropped down by one cent on each of them and suddenly the numbers flopped okay 90 percent of the people took the free thing instead of the cheaper version of the of the super nice chocolate okay and they tried the other direction let's take it from two from one cent to two cent they jumped it up and it still said 50 50 the only difference is when it became free the majority shifted people shifted to free uh instantly because it was free okay so I first heard that I was like that's kind of cool like people want stuff for free and uh and how can I create stuff in my business that gives them stuff for free if I know that that the majority of people will will are more likely accept my offer the second it becomes free if I'm a chiropractor and everyone's out there offering discount exams or you know if I'm a car dealership and I'm doing our insurance salesman or whatever it is and everyone's offering discounts if I can offer it mine for free suddenly the majority of the people are going to shift over to me what what can I do how can I structure my offer to make that they make that happen right so we started thinking about that and testing that trying to figure out how could we how could we do that how could we make that happen right and so um we started coming up with a bunch of different ideas this is probably four or five years ago when we first started testing this and something really interesting came out of it and um this is called my hundred visitor test and we tested extensively with tons of markets tons of sales funnels and the the feed the what happened is really interesting so this is how it works we sent a hundred visitors to a website right and on that website they purchased a product all right and the product was $197 and we had to have really really good copy and we had to tweak and test until we were able to get about one percent of the people who we set here to purchase the product okay so if we send a hundred visitors one percent of people buy this thing we made $197 and we received one customer right one new customer now we could sell to and market other things all that kind of thing okay then we started shifting
